questions.prompt: Do you ____ opening the window? It’s a little hot in here.
questions.explain: Do you mind + V-ing...? 是固定句型，表示「你介意……嗎？」

questions.prompt: I was very tired, ____ I went to bed early.
questions.explain: 前因後果，結果句用 so。

questions.prompt: The song ____ by a famous singer last year.
questions.explain: sing 的過去分詞是 sung，不是 sang。

questions.prompt: After dinner, Kevin went back to his ____ to finish his homework quietly.
questions.explain: 這裡的 study 是名詞，表示「書房」。

questions.prompt: Tina likes PE, and ____ do I.
questions.explain: likes 是一般動詞，所以附和時要借助 do，正確結構是 so do I。

questions.prompt: The ____ by the river says “No Swimming.”
questions.explain: 河邊寫著禁止游泳的「標誌」是 sign。
can 後面接原形動詞，而且 both...and... 兩邊要平行，所以是 sing and dance。

questions.prompt: Dark clouds are often a ____ that rain is coming.
questions.explain: 烏雲是下雨的「徵兆」，所以選 sign。這裡考 sign 的另一個意思。

questions.prompt: She not only cooked dinner ____ cleaned the kitchen.
questions.explain: 固定句型是 not only...but also...。
